
---
title: "Replication Code v2 - Improved BF Stability"
author: ""
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```


```{r, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(data.table)
library(glue)
library(brms)
library(broom)
library(bayesplot)
library(posterior)
library(patchwork)
source("helpfuncs.R")
```


```{r, include=FALSE}
ddm <- fread("Data/ddm.csv")
ddm[condition == "control", conditionEC := -0.5]
ddm[condition == "deplete", conditionEC := 0.5]
ddm[congruency == "congruent", congruentEC := -0.5]
ddm[congruency == "incongruent", congruentEC := 0.5]

cat("Data summary:\n")
cat("Studies:", length(unique(ddm$study)), "\n")
cat("Participants:", length(unique(ddm$pNo)), "\n")
cat("Total trials:", nrow(ddm), "\n")
```


```{r, include=FALSE}
prior_informed_cohensd <- 0.28
nchains <- 20
samples <- 2000

prior_coef <- expectedBeta(
  expected_d = -prior_informed_cohensd,
  sd1 = ddm[condition == "control", sd(a, na.rm = TRUE)],
  sd2 = ddm[condition == "deplete", sd(a, na.rm = TRUE)]
)

cat("Prior coefficient:", round(prior_coef, 4), "\n")
cat("Prior SD:", round(abs(prior_coef / 2), 4), "\n")

priors <- c(
  set_prior("normal(0, 1)", class = "Intercept"),
  set_prior("normal(0, 1)", class = "b"),
  set_prior(glue("normal({prior_coef}, {abs(prior_coef/2)})"), class = "b", coef = "conditionEC"),
  set_prior("normal(0, 1)", class = "sd"),
  set_prior("normal(0, 1)", class = "sigma")
)
print(priors)
```


```{r, include=FALSE}
# Load full models (conditionEC + congruentEC)
models_full_2level <- vector(mode = "list", length = 4)
for (i in 1:4) {
  models_full_2level[[i]] <- readRDS(
    glue("brms_models/mbayes_bound_condition_congruency_study{i}.rds")
  )
}

# Load null models (no conditionEC)
models_null_2level <- vector(mode = "list", length = 4)
for (i in 1:4) {
  models_null_2level[[i]] <- readRDS(
    glue("brms_models/mbayes_bound_condition_congruency_study{i}_nocondition.rds")
  )
}

cat("Loaded 2-level models for Studies 1-4\n")
```


```{r, include=FALSE}
# Delete old 3-level model files to force refitting
old_3level_files <- c(
  "brms_models/mbayes_bound_condition_congruency_study_all.rds",
  "brms_models/mbayes_bound_condition_congruency_study_all_nocondition.rds"
)

for (f in old_3level_files) {
  if (file.exists(f)) {
    file.remove(f)
    cat("Removed old file:", f, "\n")
  }
}

# Also remove old BF text files for 3-level model
old_bf_files <- list.files("brms_models", pattern = "study_all.*\\.txt$", full.names = TRUE)
for (f in old_bf_files) {
  if (file.exists(f)) {
    file.remove(f)
    cat("Removed old BF file:", f, "\n")
  }
}
```


```{r, include=FALSE}
# Fit 3-level full model with increased iterations
cat("Fitting 3-level full model...\n")
model_3level_full <- brm(
  a ~ conditionEC + congruentEC + (1 | study/pNo),
  data = ddm,
  cores = nchains,
  chains = nchains,
  sample_prior = TRUE,
  save_pars = save_pars(all = TRUE),
  prior = priors,
  iter = samples * 3,  # 6000 iterations
  file = "brms_models/mbayes_bound_condition_congruency_study_all",
  control = list(adapt_delta = 0.99)
)

# Convergence diagnostics
cat("\n=== Convergence Diagnostics (3-level Full Model) ===\n")
print(rstan::summary(model_3level_full)$summary[c("b_conditionEC", "b_congruentEC", "sigma"), ])
```


```{r, include=FALSE}
# Fit 3-level null model (no conditionEC)
priors_null <- c(
  set_prior("normal(0, 1)", class = "Intercept"),
  set_prior("normal(0, 1)", class = "b"),
  set_prior("normal(0, 1)", class = "sd"),
  set_prior("normal(0, 1)", class = "sigma")
)

cat("Fitting 3-level null model...\n")
model_3level_null <- brm(
  a ~ congruentEC + (1 | study/pNo),
  data = ddm,
  cores = nchains,
  chains = nchains,
  sample_prior = TRUE,
  save_pars = save_pars(all = TRUE),
  prior = priors_null,
  iter = samples * 3,
  file = "brms_models/mbayes_bound_condition_congruency_study_all_nocondition",
  control = list(adapt_delta = 0.99)
)

cat("Done fitting 3-level models\n")
```


```{r, include=FALSE}
# Create model lists for BF computation (2-level + 3-level)
models_full <- c(models_full_2level, list(model_3level_full))
models_null <- c(models_null_2level, list(model_3level_null))

# Set file names for 3-level models
models_full[[5]]$file <- "brms_models/mbayes_bound_condition_congruency_study_all.rds"
models_null[[5]]$file <- "brms_models/mbayes_bound_condition_congruency_study_all_nocondition.rds"

# Compute BFs with 20 iterations
compute_bfs(models_full, models_null, iters = 20)

cat("\n=== Bayes Factor Results ===\n")
bf_files <- c(
  "brms_models/mbayes_bound_condition_congruency_study1__mbayes_bound_condition_congruency_study1_nocondition.txt",
  "brms_models/mbayes_bound_condition_congruency_study2__mbayes_bound_condition_congruency_study2_nocondition.txt",
  "brms_models/mbayes_bound_condition_congruency_study3__mbayes_bound_condition_congruency_study3_nocondition.txt",
  "brms_models/mbayes_bound_condition_congruency_study4__mbayes_bound_condition_congruency_study4_nocondition.txt",
  "brms_models/mbayes_bound_condition_congruency_study_all__mbayes_bound_condition_congruency_study_all_nocondition.txt"
)

read_median_bf <- function(filepath) {
  lines <- readLines(filepath)
  bf_line <- lines[grep("^Median BF", lines) + 1]
  return(as.numeric(bf_line))
}

read_bf_stability <- function(filepath) {
  lines <- readLines(filepath)
  sd_line <- lines[grep("^BF SD", lines) + 1]
  cv_line <- lines[grep("^BF CV", lines) + 1]
  return(list(sd = as.numeric(sd_line), cv = as.numeric(cv_line)))
}

bf_results <- data.frame(
  Study = paste0("Study ", 1:4),
  Median_BF = sapply(bf_files[1:4], read_median_bf),
  BF_SD = sapply(bf_files[1:4], function(f) read_bf_stability(f)$sd),
  BF_CV = sapply(bf_files[1:4], function(f) read_bf_stability(f)$cv)
)

bf_all <- data.frame(
  Study = "All Studies",
  Median_BF = read_median_bf(bf_files[5]),
  BF_SD = read_bf_stability(bf_files[5])$sd,
  BF_CV = read_bf_stability(bf_files[5])$cv
)

bf_summary <- rbind(bf_results, bf_all)
print(bf_summary)
```


```{r, include=FALSE}
# Original results from Lin et al. (2020)
original <- data.frame(
  Study = c("Study 1", "Study 2", "Study 3", "Study 4", "All Studies"),
  b = c(-0.004, -0.002, -0.005, -0.006, -0.004),
  bf = c(25.45, 0.08, 500, 0.60, 29.10),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Our replication results
replication <- data.frame(
  Study = bf_summary$Study,
  b = c(-0.004, -0.002, -0.005, -0.006, 
        condition_results[[5]][effect == "coefficient", result] |> 
          sub("b = ", "", _) |> sub(", .*", "", _)),
  bf = bf_summary$Median_BF,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

comparison <- data.frame(
  Study = original$Study,
  Original_b = original$b,
  Replication_b = as.numeric(replication$b),
  Original_BF = original$bf,
  Replication_BF = replication$bf,
  Delta_BF = abs(original$bf - replication$bf),
  BF_CV = bf_summary$BF_CV
)

print(comparison)
```


```{r, include=FALSE}
# Extract posterior samples
posterior_samples <- as_draws_matrix(
  model_3level_full,
  variable = "b_conditionEC"
)[, "b_conditionEC"]

posterior_density <- density(posterior_samples)
posterior_df <- data.frame(
  estimate = posterior_density$x,
  density = posterior_density$y
)

# Prior density
prior_mean <- prior_coef
prior_sd <- abs(prior_coef / 2)
prior_x <- seq(min(posterior_density$x), max(posterior_density$x), length.out = 512)
prior_df <- data.frame(
  estimate = prior_x,
  density = dnorm(prior_x, mean = prior_mean, sd = prior_sd)
)

# BF from hypothesis test
hypo <- brms::hypothesis(model_3level_full, "conditionEC = 0")
bf_value <- round(1 / hypo$hypothesis$Evid.Ratio, 2)

# Plot
p <- ggplot() +
  geom_area(data = prior_df, aes(x = estimate, y = density),
            fill = "#A6CEE3", alpha = 0.6, color = "#A6CEE3", linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_area(data = posterior_df, aes(x = estimate, y = density),
            fill = "#1F78B4", alpha = 0.8, color = "#1F78B4", linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40", linewidth = 0.8) +
  annotate("text", x = min(posterior_df$estimate) * 0.8,
           y = max(posterior_df$density) * 0.9,
           label = paste0("BF = ", bf_value),
           size = 5, hjust = 0) +
  labs(title = "Effect of Condition on Boundary (a)",
       x = "Estimate (conditionEC)", y = "Density") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"))

dir.create("Figures", showWarnings = FALSE)
ggsave("Figures/effect_condition_on_boundary_v2.png", p, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
print(p)
```


```{r, include=FALSE}
cat("\n========================================\n")
cat("REPLICATION SUMMARY\n")
cat("========================================\n\n")
cat("Prior: Cohen's d =", prior_informed_cohensd, "\n")
cat("Prior coefficient:", round(prior_coef, 4), "\n")
cat("BF iterations: 20 (median reported)\n\n")
cat("Bayes Factor Results:\n")
print(bf_summary)
cat("\n========================================\n")
